description: Parameters consumed by the smoke test stage script. All fields are optional — the default implementation runs a standard set of JDK smoke tests.

parameterGroups.name: Smoke Test Options
parameterGroups.description: Controls for the quick post-build validation tests. These tests verify the JDK binary is functional before any signing or publishing steps run.

parameters.name: SMOKE_TEST_TIMEOUT
parameters.description: Maximum time in minutes to allow the smoke tests to run before failing. Increase for slow platforms (e.g. s390x).
